description_long: This shotgun features a robust, elongated black metal barrel with a wooden stock and fore-end, giving it a classic, utilitarian appearance. The stock is full-sized and made of dark brown wood, providing a sturdy shoulder rest, while the grip area is contoured for ergonomic handling. The receiver and barrel are constructed from dark metal, with a simple, unadorned design and no visible ribbing or venting along the barrel. The trigger guard is rounded and moderately sized, with a smooth curve and no additional reinforcement or finger grooves. The shotgun lacks any visible pump or lever mechanism, suggesting a semi-automatic or similar action. Overall, the object combines traditional wood and metal materials, with a straightforward, functional design suitable for urban or rural environments.
description: A classic shotgun with a black metal barrel and dark brown wooden stock, featuring a rounded trigger guard and ergonomic grip. The design is simple and functional, with no visible pump or lever.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the shotgun, highlighting the wooden stock, contoured grip, and elongated black barrel.
description_view_1: Front view displaying the narrow profile of the barrel and the alignment of the stock behind it.
description_view_2: Opposite side view mirroring view 0, with clear visibility of the wooden stock and metal barrel.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the end of the stock and the straight alignment of the barrel and receiver.
attribute_barrel_configuration: single-barrel, no visible ribbing or venting, standard length
attribute_trigger_guard_design: rounded, moderately sized, smooth with no finger grooves or reinforcement
